output.applicable_regime: Jurisdiction-specific; verify against applicable central-bank / CSD / legislative framework
output.note: Educational classification — not legal or settlement advice. Tier 1 = legally final (CBM/SFD); Tier 2 = conditional (deposit token/PFMI); Tier 3 = contractual (stablecoin); Tier 4 = unclear/none. Gates wts-cross-network-dvp atomicity check.
output.recommendation: Tier 4 — finality unclear. Do not use this asset class for wholesale settlement without legal clarification. Obtain SFD designation or PFMI compliance assessment. Run wts-settlement-asset.
output.status_asof: 2026-06-20 — verify EU SFD 98/26/EC, UCC Art.12, CPMI-IOSCO PFMI Principle 8 against current regulatory guidance
